prestazioni: Engine: XK6 3.8L inline-6 (engine code: XK6-3.8) bored to 4.0L with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 350+ hp reliability

Forced induction: Sprintex S2-362 supercharger (10 psi boost) with a custom intercooler setup by Bell Auto Services, paired with a TWM 45mm throttle body and a custom fuel system featuring Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump and ID1000 injectors

Suspension: Koni 2812 adjustable shocks with custom-valved springs (1.5-inch drop) and polygraphite bushings from SuperPro, paired with a TWR (Tom Walkinshaw Racing) front strut brace and a custom-fabricated rear subframe reinforcement by RML Group
estetica: Body: Full lightweight aluminum body restoration with a custom widebody conversion using hand-formed 18-gauge aluminum panels by RS Panels, replicating the 1964 E-Type Lightweight spec with riveted flares and a functional hood scoop for the intercooler

Wheels: 15x7 and 15x8.5-inch Minilite magnesium wheels (original E-Type Lightweight spec) with 205/70R15 and 225/70R15 Avon CR6ZZ tires, powder-coated in satin gold to match the original Lightweight color code (Polaris White with gold accents)

Interior: Full bespoke interior by SNG Barratt featuring a lightweight aluminum dashboard with Smiths gauges (3.5-inch tachometer, 100-psi oil pressure, and 270-degree water temp), a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec with integrated harness bar), and Recaro SRD bucket seats trimmed in black Alcantara with red stitching
